payload.label: basket
payload.long_description: Tall cylindrical gray woven basket with a chevron/herringbone textile pattern and a dark interior opening; the object is partially edge-cropped in the frame, appears fabric or painted wicker in texture, standing on a wood floor, approximately 0.8 meters from the camera.
